title: Corporal Kate
writer: Zelda Sears, Marion Orth, Albert S. Le Vino
actors: Vera Reynolds, Kenneth Thomson, Julia Faye
plot: Kate Jones and Becky Finkelstein are manicurists who decide to go overseas and entertain American troops during the Great War. Clark Jackson, a wealthy playboy, and William, his valet, are members of the A.E.F, and William becomes...
